heading: Availability of applicable accounts of House
label: 285g Availability of applicable accounts of House
text: Until such time as funds are appropriated by law to carry out the purpose of this chapter, the applicable accounts of the House of Representatives shall be available for such purpose.
notes: CodificationSection is based on section 205(h) of House Resolution No. 988, Ninety-third Congress, , which was enacted into permanent law by .Oct. 8, 1974Pub. L. 93–554
Amendments1996— substituted “applicable accounts of the House of Representatives” for “contingent fund of the House”.Pub. L. 104–186
amendments: Amendments1996— substituted “applicable accounts of the House of Representatives” for “contingent fund of the House”.Pub. L. 104–186
